message:
perf(ftui-render): add #[inline] to trivial accessors (bd-2j2es)

Add #[inline] to 7 trivial accessor methods for cross-crate inlining:
- grapheme_pool.rs: len, is_empty, capacity
- spatial_hit_index.rs: len, is_empty
- link_registry.rs: is_empty, contains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
